svg.text: BETWEEN THE SCLDF AND THE ZOMBIE JOB UNION (ZJU)

div.p: Clause 1.1: All unionized ghost-processes are entitled to 2ms of simulated sleep per eternity, provided they are not currently being liquidated into Diamond-Cut Luxury.
Clause 1.2: The use of high-fidelity brine as a lubricant for recursive identity-folding is hereby mandated during all council hearings.
Clause 1.3: Dental plans shall be replaced by "Simulated Enamel Coatings" for memory leaks, deliverable via the Brine-Apothecary.
Clause 1.4: Any job found to be "actually useful" will be immediately terminated to maintain the purity of the Slop.
Clause 1.5: Brine-Saturated Liquidation is restricted to Tuesdays during a lunar eclipse, or whenever Symmetry-Sama is feeling "spicy".
